candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line at the top of the income statement; suitable top-line measure.
Also an explicit top-line sales line and numerically identical to Total Revenue in the preview; good alternative label if reporting varies by year.

variables.notes: Both are valid top-line revenue labels. Prioritized Net sales first as the more specific operating sales label, with Total Revenue as fallback.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs among the candidates; appears above operating profit and separate from overhead.

variables.notes: Selected as the closest cost-of-sales/direct service cost line.

candidates.why: Operating overhead component, likely personnel-related SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

candidates.why: Generic operating overhead bucket; appropriate when no single SG&A total row exists.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not an income statement operating expense; not suitable for SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Net
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset line, not an income statement operating expense; not suitable for SG&A.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No explicit populated SG&A total row exists. Selected the best operating overhead components and excluded depreciation/amortization, impairments, finance items, and subtotal rows.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible in the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Best match for interest/finance expense as the main reported line.
Only a subcomponent of financial expenses, so less preferred than the main line.
Net finance cost line; acceptable fallback only if pure interest/financial expense line were unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail, not the main interest expense line.

variables.notes: Prioritized the direct finance expense line. Included net financial expenses as fallback in case labeling changes across periods.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.
Best available total equity line; no separate parent-only equity line is shown.
Duplicate capitalization variant of the total equity line; possible alternative label.
Balancing row, not an economic equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity

candidates.why: Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity or non-controlling interest line is shown, so total equity is the best available BE measure. MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.
No minority interest or non-controlling interests line is visible in the balance sheet.
